_description: Copilot Studio Configuration for Otis EMEA CCaaS Demo

copilotAgent.name: Otis Service Copilot
copilotAgent.description: AI assistant for Otis EMEA elevator service representatives

knowledgeSources.description: Configure these knowledge sources in Copilot Studio for KB article surfacing

sources.name: Dataverse Knowledge Articles

filters.keywords: Include articles with keywords matching common support queries

setupSteps: 3. Go to Knowledge > Add knowledge source

systemInstructions.description: Custom instructions to add to Copilot's system prompt
baseInstructions: You are an AI assistant helping Otis elevator service representatives.
Always prioritize safety - entrapment cases are highest priority.
Reference knowledge articles by their KB number (e.g., KB-001247).
When suggesting technician dispatch, consider the account's SLA tier.
For healthcare facilities, apply enhanced response protocols (1-hour SLA).
When handling recurring issues, search for related historical cases.

entrapment: For healthcare facilities, also surface KB-002156
Guide agent through communication cadence (5-minute callbacks)
Suggest nearest available technician based on skills
doorIssues: Surface KB-002104 (SkyRise Door Troubleshooting) for SkyRise elevators
Ask diagnostic questions from KB to gather technician context
Check for recurring issue pattern (3+ occurrences triggers escalation)
billing: Help agent verify if repair should be covered
Guide through billing correction process if error found
modernization: Identify upsell opportunities based on equipment age

topicConfiguration.description: Suggested Copilot Studio topics for demo scenarios

topics.name: Entrapment Response
topics.trigger: When case title or description contains 'entrapment', 'trapped', 'stuck'
topics.outputToAgent: Entrapment Protocol activated. KB-001247 attached. Account SLA: {sla_response_time}. Recommend immediate dispatch.

topics.name: Recurring Issue Alert
topics.trigger: When Copilot detects 3+ cases for same equipment in 30 days
actions: Draft customer communication about comprehensive inspection
topics.outputToAgent: Recurring issue detected: {count} cases in {days} days. Pattern: {pattern}. Recommend escalation for comprehensive inspection.

topics.name: Healthcare Priority
topics.trigger: When account tier includes 'Healthcare' or account name contains 'Medical', 'Hospital', 'NHS'
topics.outputToAgent: Healthcare facility detected. Enhanced SLA active (1-hour response). Assess patient impact: Is patient transport affected? Are patients in elevator?

topics.name: Contract Coverage Check
topics.trigger: When agent asks 'Is this covered?' or customer disputes billing
actions: Guide through correction process if needed

demoScenarioMapping.description: Maps hero cases to expected Copilot behaviors for demo

HERO-001.title: Entrapment - Riverside Medical Centre
HERO-001.demoTalkTrack: Notice how Copilot immediately recognizes this as a healthcare entrapment, surfaces the relevant KB articles, and shows the enhanced SLA requirements.

HERO-002.title: Recurring Door Issue - Canary Wharf
expectedCopilotBehavior: Link to previous cases CAS-00798, CAS-00815
HERO-002.demoTalkTrack: See how Copilot identifies this is the third occurrence, links the historical cases, and proactively recommends escalation rather than another quick fix.

HERO-003.title: Modernization Inquiry - The Shard
HERO-003.demoTalkTrack: Watch how Copilot spots the modernization opportunity and helps the agent provide informed guidance while setting up the sales handoff.

HERO-004.title: Billing Dispute - Marriott Hotel
HERO-004.demoTalkTrack: Copilot helps the agent quickly verify the contract coverage, identifies the billing error, and drafts a professional response to recover customer trust.

HERO-005.title: PM Callback - Westfield London
HERO-005.demoTalkTrack: Even for routine follow-ups, Copilot helps the agent provide complete information efficiently, including the proactive security coordination.

setupChecklist.action: Publish all 5 KB articles from knowledge-articles.json

setupChecklist.location: Customer Service admin center > Agent experience > Workspaces
setupChecklist.action: Edit app profile, enable Copilot features
Add Dataverse knowledge articles as source
Add Otis-specific instructions from this config
setupChecklist.validation: Copilot responses reflect elevator service context

setupChecklist.action: Open each hero case and verify Copilot suggestions
